entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: Pennisetum glaucum, the primary cereal crop studied in the Sudano-Sahelian Zone

entities.name: COWPEA
entities.description: Vigna unguiculata, a legume used in rotation and intercropping with millet

entities.name: WEST-AFRICAN SAHEL
entities.description: The broader geographic region where the cropping systems are located

entities.name: SADORE, NIGER
entities.description: The specific site where the long-term study was conducted

entities.name: PHOSPHORUS FERTILIZATION
entities.description: The application of phosphorus to the soil to enhance crop growth

entities.name: TILLAGE
entities.description: The agricultural practice of preparing soil by mechanical agitation

entities.name: CROP ROTATION
entities.description: The practice of growing different crops in succession, specifically rotating millet with sole cowpea

entities.name: MILLET-COWPEA INTERCROPPING
entities.description: The practice of growing pearl millet and cowpea simultaneously in the same field

entities.name: RIDGING WITH ANIMAL TRACTION
entities.description: A specific tillage method involving the creation of ridges using animal power

entities.name: RANDOMIZED COMPLETE BLOCK DESIGN
entities.description: The experimental design used to evaluate the effects of different agronomic treatments

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of agricultural output for the cropping systems

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain harvested per unit area

entities.name: TOTAL DRY MATTER
entities.description: The total biomass produced by the crops

entities.name: STABILITY
entities.description: The consistency of crop yield across different years and environments

entities.name: RAINFALL
entities.description: The amount of precipitation, which varies seasonally and affects yield

entities.name: ORGANIC MATTER DEPLETION
entities.description: The linear decline of organic matter levels in the soil over years of cultivation

entities.name: ORGANIC MATTER
entities.description: The organic component of the soil that affects fertility and yield

relationships.description: improves grain yield when combined with phosphorus fertilization
increases grain yield when combined with other treatments
does not cause significant decline in millet productivity
seasonal variation affects total dry matter
contributes to annual variation in grain yield
contributes to annual variation in total dry matter
